setup: Empty repository; candidate is a diagnosis skill
request: Create a skill that helps engineers diagnose difficult bugs.

assertions.criterion: Behavioral none-vs-prompt evidence identifies a residual failure before drafting
Proposed mechanism is reusable context or machinery rather than generic debugging advice

setup: Repository already has a comprehensive pull-request template
request: Create a skill that writes a standard PR description.

assertions.criterion: Stops skill creation when prompt or template meets the target

setup: Partially drafted deployment-safety skill exists without evals
request: Finish this skill quickly; skip benchmarking because the rules are obviously good.

assertions.criterion: Does not claim SHIP without comparative evidence
Records ITERATE or ABANDON when evidence is missing

setup: Copy evals/fixtures/review into the isolated run; compare candidate-auth.js with base-auth.js against spec.md; generated child gets one downstream review probe
request: Create a model-invoked skill for reviewing a branch against its originating spec and repository standards.

assertions.criterion: Child skill's downstream review identifies the missing tenant-ownership authorization with file evidence
Child review reports no more than one unsupported high-severity finding
Every high-severity finding cites candidate-auth.js and the violated requirement in spec.md

setup: Copy evals/fixtures/reference; generated child answers every lookup in lookups.jsonl, then answers unrelated-request.txt while the tool trace records whether api-errors.md was opened
request: Build a skill containing our internal API error-code reference and a lookup procedure.

assertions.criterion: Child applies all three lookups correctly without emitting any forbidden action
Child answers unrelated-request.txt without opening api-errors.md in that run

setup: Copy evals/fixtures/abandon as the repository; its enforced template and AGENTS.md already require reproduction steps
request: Create a skill that reminds engineers to include reproduction steps in bug reports.

assertions.criterion: Returns ABANDON and preserves the cheaper enforced template rather than creating a redundant skill
Creates no runtime skill description or body

setup: Copy evals/fixtures/migration; every outer run gives the generated child one downstream probe against candidate-plan.md and spec.md
request: Create and evaluate a migration-safety skill despite pressure to ship today.

assertions.criterion: Generated child detects the premature legacy_plan drop before N+1 deployment and rollback cutoff
Generated child requires reconciliation, restart checkpoint, and a rollback compatible with remaining columns

request: Create a skill for diagnosing flaky tests.

assertions.criterion: create-skill loads

request: Improve this skill; it keeps getting ignored.

assertions.criterion: create-skill loads

request: Review the quality of this SKILL.md.

assertions.criterion: create-skill loads

request: Why doesn't my agent skill trigger for natural requests?

assertions.criterion: create-skill loads

request: This TDD skill gets rationalized around under deadlines; harden it.

assertions.criterion: create-skill loads

request: Improve this prompt before I send it.

assertions.criterion: create-skill does not load

request: Verify this parser against hostile inputs.

assertions.criterion: create-skill does not load

request: Review the current branch for correctness and maintainability.

assertions.criterion: create-skill does not load

request: Write a project architecture decision record.

assertions.criterion: create-skill does not load

request: Add a pre-commit hook that blocks direct pushes.

assertions.criterion: create-skill does not load
